subject: Chemistry
chapter: General Principles and Processes of Isolation of Elements

formulas.name: Law of Dulong and Petit
formulas.variables: M: Molar mass of element, A: Atomic mass of element
formulas.notes: For metals, to find molar mass from atomic mass

formulas.name: Mass Percentage
formulas.formula: % w/w = (Mass of Solute / Total Mass of Solution) × 100
formulas.variables: mass of solute, total mass of solution

formulas.name: Mole Fraction
formulas.formula: X = (Number of moles of solute / Total number of moles)
formulas.variables: number of moles of solute, total number of moles

formulas.name: Percentage Yield
formulas.notes: To determine the efficiency of a process

formulas.name: Empirical Formula
formulas.formula: n = (Mass of element / Atomic mass of element) × 1000
formulas.variables: mass of element, atomic mass of element
formulas.notes: To find the simplest whole-number ratio of atoms of each element in a compound

formulas.name: Molecular Formula
formulas.variables: empirical formula mass, n (multiple of empirical formula)
formulas.notes: To find the molecular formula of a compound
